questions.question: What is the typical duration of an 8-hour workday in many countries?
questions.explanation: The 8-hour workday is a standard in many countries

questions.question: In convex optimization, an 8-hour approach is often used to solve optimization problems.
questions.explanation: Dynamic programming is a method that solves problems by breaking them down into smaller sub-problems

questions.question: How many hours of sleep is recommended for adults after a long day of work?
questions.explanation: Getting enough sleep is essential for physical and mental health

questions.question: In project management, an 8-hour workday can be divided into smaller blocks of time.
questions.explanation: Time blocking is a method of scheduling appointments and tasks into fixed time slots

questions.question: What is the typical duration of a standard lecture or class?
questions.explanation: Most lectures or classes last for several hours
